name: io.github.opendatalab/mineru-open-mcp
title: MinerU Open MCP
description: Parse PDFs, Word docs, PowerPoint files, spreadsheets, and images into Markdown using MinerU's document parsing API. Flash mode works without an API key.

environmentVariables.name: MINERU_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: MinerU API token for full capability (higher limits, extra output formats). Omit to use free Flash mode (Markdown only, 20 pages / 10 MB per file).

environmentVariables.name: OUTPUT_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory for saved parse results when content is written to disk.
